allow: Bash(node -e "const cp = require\('cron-parser'\); const i = cp.parseExpression\('0 9 * * 1-5'\); console.log\(i.next\(\).toDate\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('cron-parser'\).then\(m => { console.log\(Object.keys\(m\)\); const i = m.parseExpression\('0 9 * * 1-5'\); console.log\(i.next\(\).toDate\(\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('cron-parser'\).then\(m => { const parser = m.CronExpressionParser; const i = parser.parse\('0 9 * * 1-5'\); console.log\(i.next\(\).toDate\(\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\);")
